# AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships to other resources that you can set with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.AppClipDefaultExperienceLocalization**: The relationship to the Default App Clip Experience Localizations resource you set with the request that creates an App Clip Header Images resource.

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImageCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: The attributes you set that describe the new App Clip Header Images resource.
